title: Fresh Floral Ukrainian Beef Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian dish featuring beef stock concentrate and floral notes, cooked in a traditional clay tajine vessel. This recipe is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: beef stock concentrate
ingredients.notes: make sure to choose a low-sodium option

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the clay tajine vessel over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the dried thyme, rose petals, cumin, and coriander, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef stock concentrate and 2 cups of water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot.
Let the tagine rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve with crusty bread or over rice.
